description: P9.E2 formal qwen35moe Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M 512/128 E2E correctness contract for the resident T16 decode-repack GEMV path vs the legacy row-GEMV path.

prompt.description: Matches the retained qwen35moe benchmark prompt shape without committing a 512-token literal list.

acceptance.comparison: candidate logits vs legacy row-GEMV reference logits over 129 rows (prefill sample + 128 decode steps)
acceptance.purpose: Fail loudly if resident T16 decode-repack GEMV drift grows beyond the formal P9 threshold.

benchmark_gate_usage.p9_a3: Run before accepting GDN/P9.A3 throughput rows when WMMA prefill is enabled.
benchmark_gate_usage.p9_b7: Run before accepting decode-GEMV/P9.B7 throughput rows when HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 is enabled.
